name: Sintx Technologies, Inc.
business: SINTX Technologies is an advanced ceramics company that develops, manufactures, and commercializes silicon nitride biomaterials, composites, devices, and related technologies for medical and other high-value applications, including spinal implants and foot/ankle wedge systems. It also manufactures parts for customers in the electrical, aerospace, and industrial sectors. The company's products have been implanted in humans since 2008.

exposures.sentence: SINTX Technologies is an advanced ceramics company that develops, manufactures, and commercializes silicon nitride biomaterials, composites, devices, and related technologies for medical and other high-value applications.
We also manufacture parts made from silicon nitride for customers in the electrical, aerospace and other industrial sectors.
We have conducted tests which have identified and verified the antipathogenic properties of our silicon nitride powders, fully dense components, and silicon nitride-containing composites.
In 2025, we received the issuance of International Patent No. 7635292, which covers novel agricultural uses of our silicon nitride, particularly in plant protection and antimicrobial treatment.
We are leveraging proprietary Silicon Nitride (SiN) and Polyether Ether Ketone (PEEK) formulation to advance AI designed 3D printing capabilities for Custom and Patient-Specific medical implants.

catalysts.event: FDA 510(k) clearance for SiNAPTIC Foot & Ankle Osteotomy Wedge System
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, SINTX received U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) 510(k) clearance for the SiNAPTIC Foot & Ankle Osteotomy Wedge System, enabling SINTX s commercial entry into reconstructive foot and ankle surgery in the United States.

catalysts.event: Expected start of revenue from SiNAPTIC foot/ankle wedge system
catalysts.sentence: Revenue is expected to begin during the first half of 2026.
